segments.text: At 166% damage and still building the advantage!
segments.original_text: パーセンテージも166%という状況をさらに掴んでいく

segments.text: Let's keep stacking up that damage percentage!
segments.original_text: さあまだまだパーセンテージを取っていきます

full_text: At 166% damage and still building the advantage! Let's keep stacking up that damage percentage! Keep this pressure on!
